name: Jean Kuhn
seeking: Podcast guest appearances on business turnaround and marketing shows, speaking engagements at women's entrepreneurship events, and consulting partnerships with coaches serving women business owners over 50.
who_you_serve: Jean serves women business owners over 50 who are looking to increase their client base and revenue, and who feel overwhelmed by their current marketing efforts.
what_you_do: Jean Kuhn is a business strategy consultant and speaker who specializes in revitalizing struggling businesses and helping them achieve significant revenue growth through effective strategies and marketing.
offering: Speaking engagements, podcast appearances, business consulting calls
bio: Jean has successfully turned around bankrupt businesses and has received testimonials from clients who have seen significant returns on their investments in her services.
service_provided: 1:1 coaching, speaking, business strategy sessions, workshops
social_proof: Helped buy and turn around two bankrupt chocolate franchise stores, clients have achieved 4x investment in 30 days, speaker and coach with a proven track record.
business_focus: Jean Kuhn is a business strategy consultant and speaker who specializes in revitalizing struggling businesses and helping them achieve significant revenue growth through effective strategies and marketing.
